title: {name} bekommt ein Geschwisterchen
moral: Sharing love makes it grow — being a big helper is a superpower

beats.beat: Title page — {name} touching {parent}'s round belly, curious and excited
{parent} tells {name} a baby is coming — {name} has lots of questions
Feeling the baby kick — {name} puts a hand on the belly, eyes wide
Helping prepare the nursery — {name} arranges a stuffed animal in the crib
Shopping for tiny clothes — {name} picks a onesie with stars on it
Drawing a welcome picture for the baby — crayons spread on the table
The big day arrives — {parent} goes to the hospital; {name} stays with family
Waiting at home — {name} is restless, clutches {companion}, looks out the window
The phone rings — the baby is here! {name} bounces with excitement
Visiting the hospital — walking down a long corridor holding a family member's hand
Meeting the baby for the first time — so tiny, wrinkly, sleeping peacefully
{name} gently touches the baby's hand — the baby grips {name}'s finger
Everyone is paying attention to the baby — {name} feels a little left out
{name} retreats to a corner with {companion}, feeling jealous and confused
{parent} notices and comes over — 'You will always be my special big kid'
{parent} asks {name} to help — fetching a diaper, singing softly to the baby
The baby stops crying when {name} sings — {name} realizes they have a special power
{name} shows the welcome drawing — {parent} puts it above the crib
Coming home from hospital — {name} holds the door open proudly
First evening together — {name} helps with bath time, splashing gently
{name} reads {companion}'s 'story' to the baby — babbles along
Family photo — everyone together on the couch, baby in the middle
{parent} tucks {name} in — 'I'm so proud of my big helper'
{name} in bed with {companion}, whispering 'Goodnight little baby,' falling asleep smiling

vocabulary_constraints.toddler: max 8 words per sentence, 3-4 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.preschool: max 12 words per sentence, 4-5 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.early-reader: max 15 words per sentence, 5-7 sentences per page
